summary: Tested soft-delete and restore functionality for transactions and appointments. Backend: All 18 API tests passed including create/soft-delete/verify-marked-deleted/restore/verify-restored/permanent-delete flows for both transactions and appointments. Frontend: TrashPage UI with all 5 tabs (Tümü, Araçlar, İşlemler, Müşteriler, Randevular) working correctly. Tab switching, warning banner, and empty state display all functional.

issues: Console warnings about Recharts dimensions (width/height -1) on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/transactions creates transaction with deleted=false - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/transactions/{id}?permanent=false soft-deletes (sets deleted=true, deleted_at) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/transactions/{id}/restore restores (sets deleted=false, deleted_at=null) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/appointments creates appointment with deleted=false - PASSED
Backend: Existing car soft-delete/restore still works - PASSED
Backend: Existing customer soft-delete/restore still works - PASSED
Frontend: All 5 tabs present (Tümü, Araçlar, İşlemler, Müşteriler, Randevular) - PASSED
Frontend: Tab switching activates correct tab (bg-primary class) - PASSED
Frontend: Warning banner shows 'Çöp Kutusu (N)' with count - PASSED
Frontend: Empty state 'Çöp Kutusu Boş' shown when no deleted items - PASSED
Frontend: Navigation to Çöp Kutusu via sidebar works - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py: Clean implementation of soft-delete for transactions at line 659-673 and appointments at line 1300-1311
Backend server.py: Restore endpoints properly reset deleted=false and deleted_at=null
Frontend TrashPage.jsx: Well-organized with useMemo for filtered deleted items, proper sorting by deleted_at
Frontend TrashPage.jsx: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend AppContext.jsx: restoreTransaction and restoreAppointment properly update local state
seed_data_creation: Created test transactions and appointments during testing, all cleaned up via permanent delete
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trash/Çöp Kutusu feature fully tested. All entity types (cars, customers, transactions, appointments) support soft-delete with deleted=true and deleted_at timestamp. Restore sets deleted=false and deleted_at=null. TrashPage shows 5 tabs for filtering. Backend endpoints: DELETE ?permanent=false for soft-delete, DELETE ?permanent=true for permanent, POST /restore to restore. All API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_trash_softdelete_restore.py.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen

features_verified.trash_page_tabs: WORKING - All 5 tabs (Tümü, Araçlar, İşlemler, Müşteriler, Randevular) present
features_verified.trash_page_tab_switching: WORKING - Tab switching highlights active tab correctly
features_verified.trash_page_empty_state: WORKING - Shows 'Çöp Kutusu Boş' when no deleted items
features_verified.trash_page_warning_banner: WORKING - Shows count of deleted items
